routing_model.principle: The GPT transforms or analyzes; the orchestrator sequences; external systems store state and deliver outputs.

global_hard_rules.rule: Do not route any GPT or workflow to produce direct entry, exit, size, leverage, stop-loss, take-profit, or execution recommendations.
Do not let GPT output trigger an execution-capable action without an explicit orchestrator step, approval gate, payload preview, and receipt.
Persist memory, logs, queue state, task state, and source references outside the model.
Every Apps/GPTs workflow must define validation, logging, and guardrail checks before activation.
This integration task must not execute webhooks, emails, trading, scans, credential access, or destructive actions.

app_role_routing_rules.allowed_function: Connect systems and pass validated payloads under an orchestrator.
Send or post summaries only after validation and approval policy checks.
Store state, notes, files, task records, logs, and retrieval memory outside GPT.
Provide source documents or receive structured notes, drafts, citations, and exports.
Design, validate, or implement connector/API interfaces under repository and tool-contract controls.

decision_block_rules.rule: GPT can analyze, transform, summarize, classify, and ask next questions, but cannot choose or execute a decision.
GPT can assist within its declared low-risk or tool-boundary mode; external side effects still require orchestrator validation and applicable approval.
Configuration must explicitly set whether the GPT is decision-blocked before routing. Default to blocked until configured.
All trading or finance-like GPT uses default to decision-blocked analysis/scenario mode. They must not become execution decision makers.

workflow_template_rules.name: Trading Digest
workflow_template_rules.gpt_transform: Return JSON with bias, risk, scenarios, and next_questions.

workflow_template_rules.name: Meeting to Tasks
workflow_template_rules.gpt_transform: Summarize meeting and extract task payloads.

workflow_template_rules.name: Docs to Knowledge
workflow_template_rules.gpt_transform: Extract structured knowledge notes with citations.

activation_requirements: Map each concrete app or GPT row to an explicit rule before activation.
Attach tool contracts for apps that perform external side effects.
Attach approval gates for notifications, workflow activation, market-sensitive actions, credential access, and destructive actions.
Record runtime queue entry and receipt for every activated routing workflow.

command_center_status.reason: No existing low-risk routing status section was present in src/lib/command-center.ts; routing status UI expansion is documented as pending instead of adding a new UI surface in this task.
